title: Constitution Kit project manifest
description: Declares the governed facts of an adopting project: its constitution directory, its machine-readable registries (each with a generator that must support a --check drift mode), and its single-value concepts (facts that must appear exactly once across the surface). The Constitution Kit gate-runner reads this file to enforce drift-zero and zero-competing-systems.

constitution_dir.description: Repo-relative path to the constitution directory (the doc set governing the project).

registries.description: Every machine-readable registry the project governs. Each registry is the single source of truth for a set of facts; derived artifacts are generated from it and drift-checked.

source.description: Repo-relative path to the registry data file.

schema.description: Optional repo-relative path to the JSON Schema the source is validated against.

generator.description: Repo-relative path to the generator script. MUST accept a --check flag that exits non-zero on drift.

outputs.description: Artifacts the generator emits. Documentation only; the generator's own --check is authoritative.

single_value_concepts.description: Facts that must appear exactly once across the surface (zero competing systems). The gate-runner scans each pattern across the globs and fails when more than one distinct value is found.

pattern.description: A JavaScript regular expression. The first capture group (or the whole match if there is none) is the value that must be uniform.

globs.description: Glob patterns (** and * supported) of files to scan.
